subject: URGENT - App keeps crashing immediately
body: This is unacceptable, your app crashes every time I open it. Please fix this immediately.

subject: Charged twice this month
body: Hello, I noticed I was charged on my card twice this billing cycle for the same invoice. Could you please look into this payment issue? Thanks, David

subject: Interested in Enterprise plan pricing
body: Hi, we're a 200-person company evaluating your product for a company-wide rollout. Could someone share pricing and set up a demo call this week?

subject: Feature idea: dark mode for dashboard
body: Would love to see a dark mode feature added to the dashboard. No rush, just a suggestion that would improve daily use for our team.

subject: Export to CSV button not working on reports page
body: When I click the export button on the Reports page, nothing happens and no file downloads. This is an error that started after the last update.

subject: Locked out of my account
body: I can't log in, my password reset isn't working and I don't have access to my account. I need this fixed soon for an important client meeting.

subject: Requesting refund for cancelled subscription
body: I cancelled my subscription last week but was still charged for the next cycle. Please process a refund for this charge.

subject: Just wanted to say thanks!
body: I love this product, your team does excellent work. Really appreciate the support so far, thank you!

subject: This is the third time I'm emailing about the same problem
body: I am extremely frustrated and disappointed. I've reported this bug twice before and it is still not working. This is unacceptable.
